query:
INSERT INTO score (chatter_id, channel_id, score, updated_at)
                    SELECT 
                        chatter_id,
                        channel_id,
                        COUNT(*) as score,
                        NOW() as updated_at
                    FROM score_event
                    GROUP BY chatter_id, channel_id
                    ON CONFLICT (chatter_id, channel_id)
                    DO UPDATE SET
                        score = EXCLUDED.score,
                        updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
